message.content:
Part 2 appends work. Now let me test the full move generation with a quick verification, then continue with check detection and output.

```json
{
  "analysis": "Part 2 works (5236 rules for move gen). Now I need to add: 1) EP handling (currently deferred), 2) Delete G-line, 3) Check detection, 4) Castling extra checks, 5) Delete illegal lines, 6) FEN output. Let me verify the current output first, then continue appending.",
  "plan": "Quick test: run all rules on the sample FEN, see if any D-lines are generated (ignoring legality for now). Then append the remaining phases.",
  "commands": [
    {"keystrokes": "python3 -c "
import re as re_mod
exec(open('/app/gen.py').read())
fen = 'rnb1k1nr/p2p1ppp/3B4/1p1NPN1P/6P1/3P1Q2/P1P5/q4Kb1 w kq - 0 1'
for p, r in rules:
    fen = re_mod.sub(p, r, fen)
lines = fen.split(chr(10))
g_lines = [l for l in lines if l.startswith('G')]
d_lines = [l for l in lines if l.startswith('D')]
other = [l for l in lines if not l.startswith('G') and not l.startswith('D') and l]
print(f'G:{len(g_lines)} D:{len(d_lines)} other:{len(other)}')
if d_lines:
    print('Sample D:', d_lines[0][:80])
" 2>&1 | tail -5
", "duration": 60}
  ]
}
```
